description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular form and gently rounded front edges. The front panel is a smooth, dark surface with a single, subtle horizontal groove that serves as a recessed handle for the drawer. The sides and back are finished in a warm, wood-grain texture, providing a visual contrast to the matte black front and top surfaces. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood, with a possible laminate or veneer finish for durability. The overall build suggests a single large drawer, with no visible label holders or lock mechanisms. Its compact size and clean lines make it suitable for contemporary office or home environments.
description: A compact, modern filing cabinet with a dark, smooth front panel and wood-grain sides, featuring a single recessed handle groove.
description_view_0: The front view shows the dark, smooth drawer face with a single horizontal recessed handle groove and rounded edges.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the wood-grain texture wrapping around the side and partially visible front, with the handle groove just visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the wood-grain back and side panels, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the wood-grain finish on the side and back, with the dark front panel receding from view.
